name: archon-codex
description: Spec-driven development workflows for Codex with guided interviews and adaptive multi-agent execution.

interface.shortDescription: Plan features with interviews and execute them with adaptive agent teams.
interface.longDescription: Archon adds two Codex-native workflows: a spec interview that produces structured feature specs and a work workflow that assesses complexity, decomposes tasks, and runs solo or multi-agent execution tiers.
defaultPrompt: Use Archon to create a spec for a new feature.
Use Archon to execute an approved technical spec.
Use Archon work mode with agent teams for this spec.
